---
name: New Skill Proposal
about: Propose a new skill for the repository
title: "[Skill] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Skill Name

A short, descriptive name in kebab-case (e.g., `my-new-skill`).

## Description

What does this skill teach AI agents to do?

## CLI Commands

Which `kpass` commands does this skill cover?

## Dependencies

Which existing skills must be installed first?

- [ ] authenticate-user
- [ ] request-session
- [ ] Other: ___

## Use Cases

Describe 1-2 scenarios where an agent would use this skill.
